## What does this change?

<!-- What did you change, and why? If it fixes an issue, say "Fixes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New SVG feature support
- [ ] New renderer feature
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Before / after

<!-- For a rendering change, please include images. They are worth more than any
     description, and reviewers cannot easily reproduce your SVG. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] New behaviour has tests (headless, against `Canvas`, where it draws)
- [ ] Public functions have type hints and docstrings
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased*
- [ ] `README.md` support table or limitations updated, if relevant

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: a specification rule you are implementing, a trade-off
     you made, something you would like a second opinion on. -->
